description:
Investigate and Fix Broken Image URLs on GitHub Pages Site

Images are not loading on the GitHub Pages deployment because the URLs are being incorrectly generated as relative paths (bartusiak.ai/wesole_nutki...) instead of absolute paths with the correct subdirectory structure (https://bartusiak.ai/images/scraped/...).

Requirements:
- Identify where image URLs are being constructed in the codebase
- Determine why the path generation differs between local development and GitHub Pages deployment
- Fix the URL construction to correctly reference images in the /images/scraped/ directory
- Ensure the fix works for both local development and GitHub Pages deployment
- Verify that base URL configuration is properly set for GitHub Pages
- Test that all images load correctly after deployment
- Check for any other assets (CSS, JS) that might have similar path issues

Example of current broken behavior:
- Current (broken): bartusiak.ai/wesole_nutki...
- Expected (working): https://bartusiak.ai/images/scraped/2023-01-30-pracuj-z-wesolymi-nutkami-0.jpg
title: Fix image URLs for GitHub Pages deployment
